subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest thy face towards God! His Holiness 'Alí-Akbar hath praised thee most highly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبل الی الله حضرت علی قبل اکبر نهایت ستایش را از شما نموده اند که
subcodes.subjects: @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
